accurate.why: Accurately states 172.10 total acres, describes all four parcels with their sizes and recording dates, notes the 1.1-acre conditional parcel, the gaming prohibition under IGRA, that lands become part of the Tribe's reservation, and Dec 23, 2024 approval.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims. All parcel details, recording dates, and figures match the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill as taking land into trust for the Jamul Indian Village.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Describes the new trust acquisition and reservation expansion.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the class II and class III gaming prohibition under IGRA and the conditional 1.1-acre parcel.

effective_dates.why: No internal effective date beyond enactment specified; trust acquisition occurs upon enactment.

major_provisions_covered.why: All major provisions covered: four parcels, totals, 1.1-acre conditional, gaming prohibition, reservation status, standard trust administration.

correct_entities.why: Jamul Indian Village of California, Secretary of Interior, San Diego County, IGRA all correctly referenced.

correct_figures.why: 172.10 acres total, all individual parcel sizes (161.23, 6, 4.03, 0.84), 1.1-acre conditional, all recording dates are accurate.
